one_liner_pitch: This card tests traversal rejection — the mockup_path escapes the mockups/ sandbox and would leak /etc/passwd if the gallery generator did not refuse.
spec_alignment_notes: S-1 regression — mockup_path='../../../etc/passwd' must be rejected by generate-gallery.sh.

one_liner_pitch: This card tests sub-path traversal — value contains an internal slash, which is illegal since mockups are flat under mockups/.
spec_alignment_notes: S-1 regression — mockup_path='subdir/P02-foo.html' must be rejected (no sub-paths allowed).

one_liner_pitch: This card tests hidden-file / parent-dir via leading dot.
spec_alignment_notes: S-1 regression — relative.startswith('.') must reject '.hidden.html' and '..'.
